title: Remove WinCan DB3 placeholder from Segment Planner
description:
Removed the empty WinCan project (DB3) placeholder card from the top of the Segment Planner tree. The planner now starts directly with your Client / City / Jobsite groups. No behavior change to imports, DB3 linking, or segment data.

Who is affected: PipeSync users on the Segment Planner tab.
changeLog: Removed WinCan project (DB3) beta placeholder branch from planner tree.
Cleaned related placeholder styles and context-menu handling.
Prior release: Production Ready V1 theme, Plan Sync saved groups UX.
